mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PARENT_ID, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NM, SHORT_CD, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET, IS_MERGE_TICKET, IS_CREATE_TICKET, IS_DIRECT_ACCESS, IS_DISPATCH_TALLY, TALLY_DATA_STAT, UPDATE_POINT, IS_TAKE, SOURCE_CD, TARGET_CD, SOURCE_NM, TARGET_NM, IS_TALLY_TON, IS_OPERATION_TON, IS_THROUGHPUT, IS_NATURAL_TON, IS_SETTLE, IS_PRE_PROCESS, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM m_work_process
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_work_process(ID, PARENT_ID, PROCESS_CD, PROCESS_NM, SHORT_CD, PLAN_TYPE_CD, PLAN_TYPE_NM, PROCESS_TYPE_CD, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD, IS_TALLY_COURSE, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET, IS_MERGE_TICKET, IS_CREATE_TICKET, IS_DIRECT_ACCESS, IS_DISPATCH_TALLY, UPDATE_POINT, IS_TAKE, SOURCE_CD, TARGET_CD, SOURCE_NM, TARGET_NM, IS_TALLY_TON, IS_OPERATION_TON, IS_THROUGHPUT, IS_NATURAL_TON, IS_SETTLE, IS_PRE_PROCESS, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE, SORT_NUM, TALLY_DATA_STAT, IS_FRONTIER, IS_MEANWHILE, IS_DISPATCH_TALLY_SH, REMARK, NEW_PROCESS, IS_CONFIRM, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planTypeNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inOutPortTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTallyCourse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSelectSubticket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isMergeTicket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isCreateTicket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDirectAccess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDispatchTally, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatePoint, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTake, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isTallyTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isOperationTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isThroughput, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNaturalTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isSettle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPreProcess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inOutStorageTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isCargoPackageChange, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tallyDataStat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isFrontier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isMeanwhile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDispatchTallySh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newProcess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isConfirm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
UPDATE m_work_process SET PARENT_ID = #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, PROCESS_CD = #{processCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NM = #{processNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHORT_CD = #{shortCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLAN_TYPE_CD = #{planTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLAN_TYPE_NM = #{planTypeNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_TYPE_CD = #{processTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE_CD = #{inOutPortTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_TALLY_COURSE = #{isTallyCourse, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SELECT_SUBTICKET = #{isSelectSubticket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_MERGE_TICKET = #{isMergeTicket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_CREATE_TICKET = #{isCreateTicket, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DIRECT_ACCESS = #{isDirectAccess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DISPATCH_TALLY = #{isDispatchTally, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_POINT = #{updatePoint, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TALLY_DATA_STAT = #{tallyDataStat, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_TAKE = #{isTake, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SOURCE_CD = #{sourceCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TARGET_CD = #{targetCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SOURCE_NM = #{sourceNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TARGET_NM = #{targetNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_TALLY_TON = #{isTallyTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_OPERATION_TON = #{isOperationTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_THROUGHPUT = #{isThroughput, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_NATURAL_TON = #{isNaturalTon, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_SETTLE = #{isSettle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_PRE_PROCESS = #{isPreProcess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD = #{inOutStorageTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_FRONTIER = #{isFrontier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_MEANWHILE = #{isMeanwhile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_DISPATCH_TALLY_SH = #{isDispatchTallySh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_CARGO_PACKAGE_CHANGE = #{isCargoPackageChange, jdbcType=INTEGER}, REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NEW_PROCESS = #{newProcess, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_CONFIRM = #{isConfirm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from m_work_process where parent_id=#{parentId} and process_nm=#{processNm}
and process_cd!=#{processCd}
